title: Cartography of 24 Minds — TF-IDF, PCA, and clustering of historical-thinker personas
description: Marimo notebook for the May 13, 2026 Cursor Boston × PyData hack. Treats 24 historical-thinker persona prompts as a text corpus, then maps them with TF-IDF, cosine similarity, PCA, KMeans clusters, and distinctive-term tables. Self-contained: embedded corpus, no API keys, no internet at run-time.
